creator: rodrigo.freebsd@minasambiente.com.br
text:
Hello Jan. First of all: Thanks for the input.
I think the discussion you propose is a valid one, but its not a bug and further discussion in here doesn't seem adequate.

You can join #freebsd-bugs on https://freenode.net/ or even send a message to bugmeister@FreeBSD.org if want try start a discussion in the subject. Despite 'suggestions' not being listed for https://www.freebsd.org/administration.html#t-bugmeister I guess it would be OK if you try.

I will forward your suggestion by pasting it at #freebsd-bugs, regardless.

You're welcome!
